# Gusto Official Product + Pricing Pages (2026)

## Summary
Authoritative Gusto pricing and product surface as of May 2026. Resolves the pricing discrepancy between comparison-article sources by confirming the $49 base for Simple plan. Reveals a 4-tier pricing structure (including a new Premium tier at $180 base), a Contractor-Only promotional tier (free for 6 months, normally $35), and a comprehensive add-on catalog covering benefits administration, instant pay, R&D tax credits, and global contractor payments.

## Key quotations / statistics
- **Confirmed 2026 base plan pricing (resolves OQ-1):**
  - Contractor Only: $0 promo (normally $35) + $6/contractor, first 6 months
  - Simple: $49 base + $6/employee/month (single-state payroll)
  - Plus: $80 base + $12/employee/month (multi-state, next-day pay, time tracking)
  - Premium: $180 base + $22/employee/month (dedicated service advisor, certified HR experts, performance tools, priority support)
- **Notable add-ons:**
  - Next-day pay on Simple: $15/mo + $3/mo per person
  - Instant pay: $100 per payroll; Same-day pay: $90 per payroll
  - Priority Support: $30/mo + $3/mo per person
  - HR Resources (certified HR experts): $50/mo + $5/mo per person
  - Performance module: $3/mo per person
  - Global contractor payments: $5 per payment to US-based bank accounts
  - R&D tax credits: 15% of identified credits (discounted with Premium)
  - Workers' comp: from $14/mo
  - Health insurance broker: $6/mo per eligible employee (free with Premium)
  - HSA: $2.50/mo per participant; FSA/Dependent care FSA/Commuter: $4/mo per participant ($20/mo minimum each)
- **Coverage:** State tax registration in all 50 states; contractor payments in 120+ countries; integrations with QuickBooks, Xero, Expensify, Hubstaff, Homebase, others; month-to-month, no long-term contracts
- **Tax filing:** Automated federal, state, local; W-2, 1099, 940, 941, 8974
- **2026 announcements:** "Gusto Showcase Spring 2026" announced "nearly 75 small improvements"; named #1 Most Innovative Company in HR 2025 (Fast Company); #1 Highest Satisfaction Software G2 2026; 500,000+ businesses on platform

## Annotations for stinger-forge
- Use the 4-tier pricing structure (Contractor Only / Simple / Plus / Premium) directly in `guides/01-platform-selection.md`. The Premium tier at $180 base + $22/employee is a new option not covered in earlier comparison sources and should be surfaced as the "white-glove" alternative to Justworks PEO for companies that want dedicated HR support without co-employment
- The Contractor Only tier at $0 base for 6 months (then $35) is a compelling acquisition path for startups that hire contractors first before W-2 employees — surface in `guides/02-classification-matrix.md` as the cheapest entry point for the "we just need to pay 3 contractors" scenario
- Health insurance broker fee structure ($6/eligible employee, free with Premium) is the differentiator that justifies Premium for companies offering group health
- The 120+ country contractor payment capability means Gusto can serve global contractor payment needs without forcing the customer to add Deel for contractors-only use cases (under 50 employees, US-based with international contractors)
- Note: Gusto does NOT offer EOR; for any international W-2 employee, an EOR (Deel/Remote/Oyster) is still required
